attributes.title: [Service] Navigation Bar
[Service] Environment Navigation

attributes.description:
Fluentd is responsible for receiving, enhancing and forwarding logs to OpenSearch. For various reasons logs can fail to pass the Fluentd pipeline, e.g., due to OpenSearch log rejections or parsing errors.

If this is the case the respective logs get stringified and redirected to a cls-rejected-* index. This dashboard visualizes the number of ingestion errors for the logs-json-kyma index, showing rejections aggregated by KCP application.

For debugging purposes you can copy the payload of a rejected log and use the Dev Tools Console to post it to the logs-json-kyma index to get a detailed error message.
